_note: instance config for the demo store's economics (spec/parts/economics.md, mechanism vs config). two lanes: 'learnings' is optional read-only history that proves the engine reconciles — never company P&L; 'company' is the live entity, at zero until its own facts land. fee_stack and take_rates are the COMPANY's forward config. rates are basis points; money is integer minor units.

learnings._note: no history landed — the learnings lane stays empty until you land your own.

company._note: the company's books — null until the entity's first period lands.
